---
name: drawio-use-case-diagram
description: >-
  Skill for creating and validating RideXpress draw.io use-case diagrams stored as
  `.drawio.svg` files. Use when asked to create, update, or fix any use-case diagram
  in architecture/diagrams/use-cases/.
user-invocable: true
---

# Draw.io Use-Case Diagram Skill

Authoritative rules for generating and validating every `.drawio.svg` use-case diagram
in the `RideXpress/docs` repository.

---

## 1. File location and naming

- Directory: `architecture/diagrams/use-cases/`
- Filename pattern: `<kebab-case-use-case-name>-use-case.drawio.svg`
  - Examples: `user-login-authentication-use-case.drawio.svg`, `request-ride-use-case.drawio.svg`

---

## 2. File structure

Every file has **two layers**:

1. **mxGraphModel XML** – embedded in the `content` attribute of the `<svg>` root element.
   This is what draw.io uses to open and edit the diagram.
2. **SVG rendering elements** – the `<path>`, `<rect>`, `<text>`, `<polygon>`, `<ellipse>`, etc.
   inside the `<svg>` body. This is what browsers and GitHub use to display the image.

Both layers must be kept in sync. When you add or change a shape in the mxGraphModel, the
corresponding SVG rendering element must also be added or updated.

### 2.1 Required file header (lines 1–4)

```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!-- Do not edit this file with editors other than draw.io -->
<!DOCTYPE svg PUBLIC "-//W3C//DTD SVG 1.1//EN" "http://www.w3.org/Graphics/SVG/1.1/DTD/svg11.dtd">
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" version="1.1"
     width="NNNpx" height="NNNpx" viewBox="-0.5 -0.5 NNN NNN"
     content="&lt;mxfile host=&quot;app.diagrams.net&quot; agent=&quot;RideXpress-docs&quot; version=&quot;24.5.3&quot; type=&quot;github&quot;&gt;
  ...mxGraphModel XML (XML-escaped)...
&lt;/mxfile&gt;" style="background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);">
```

The `content` attribute value is the full mxGraphModel XML with **every XML special character
escaped** (`<` → `&lt;`, `>` → `&gt;`, `"` → `&quot;`, `&` → `&amp;`).

### 2.2 mxGraphModel XML skeleton (inside `content`)

```xml
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="RideXpress-docs" version="24.5.3" type="github">
  <diagram name="DIAGRAM_TITLE" id="diagram-01">
    <mxGraphModel dx="1652" dy="1200" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1"
                  connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1"
                  pageWidth="CANVAS_WIDTH" pageHeight="CANVAS_HEIGHT" math="0" shadow="0">
      <root>
        <mxCell id="0" />
        <mxCell id="1" parent="0" />
        <!-- swimlane rows, shapes, and edges go here -->
      </root>
    </mxGraphModel>
  </diagram>
</mxfile>
```

### 2.3 SVG body skeleton

```xml
  <defs/>
  <g>
    <!-- SVG rendering elements go here -->
  </g>
</svg>
```

---

## 3. XML validity – CRITICAL rule

The entire file must be **well-formed XML**. Browsers reject SVG files that contain
invalid XML with "Invalid image source".

### Characters that must always be escaped in SVG text content and attribute values

| Raw character | Escaped form |
|---|---|
| `&` | `&amp;` |
| `<` | `&lt;` |
| `>` | `&gt;` |
| `"` (inside attributes) | `&quot;` |

**Common failure:** writing `(User Profile & Role)` in an SVG `<text>` element.
This must be `(User Profile &amp; Role)`.

Inside the `content` attribute the mxGraphModel XML is itself attribute-escaped, so an
`&amp;` in a label ends up as `&amp;amp;` inside `content`.

### Validation command

```bash
python3 -c "
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
try:
    ET.parse('path/to/file.drawio.svg')
    print('Valid XML')
except ET.ParseError as e:
    print('INVALID:', e)
"
```

Run this after every change. A file with parse errors will not display in GitHub or draw.io.

---

## 4. Swimlane rows (API layers)

Each diagram is a set of **horizontal swimlanes** stacked vertically, one per actor/API layer.
They flow left-to-right.

### mxGraphModel swimlane cell

```xml
<mxCell id="L1" value="LAYER_NAME"
  style="swimlane;horizontal=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=FILL;strokeColor=STROKE;"
  parent="1" vertex="1">
  <mxGeometry x="0" y="ROW_Y" width="CANVAS_WIDTH" height="200" as="geometry" />
</mxCell>
```

- `horizontal=0` makes the label appear on the left side, rotated 90°.
- `ROW_Y`: first lane at `y="0"`, second at `y="200"`, third at `y="400"`, etc. (200px increments).
- `width` = full canvas width (e.g., `1500`).

### Swimlane color palette

Use these fill/stroke pairs in top-to-bottom order:

| Layer type | fillColor | strokeColor |
|---|---|---|
| Mobile App / User-facing | `#f5f5f5` | `#666666` |
| Experience API | `#dae8fc` | `#6c8ebf` |
| Process API | `#d5e8d4` | `#82b366` |
| System API (Okta, auth) | `#fff8e1` | `#d6b656` |
| System API (DB, data) | `#f0e8f4` | `#9673a6` |

For diagrams with more layers, cycle through pastel tones or introduce new combinations.

### SVG rendering of swimlane (left-label tab)

Each swimlane needs three SVG path segments for the visual frame plus a rotated text label:

```xml
<!-- Left tab (colored) -->
<path d="M 30 ROW_Y L 0 ROW_Y L 0 ROW_BOTTOM L 30 ROW_BOTTOM"
      fill="FILL_RGB" stroke="STROKE_RGB" stroke-miterlimit="10" pointer-events="all"/>
<!-- Right area (transparent) -->
<path d="M 30 ROW_Y L CANVAS_W ROW_Y L CANVAS_W ROW_BOTTOM L 30 ROW_BOTTOM"
      fill="none" stroke="STROKE_RGB" stroke-miterlimit="10" pointer-events="none"/>
<!-- Vertical divider -->
<path d="M 30 ROW_Y L 30 ROW_BOTTOM"
      fill="none" stroke="STROKE_RGB" stroke-miterlimit="10" pointer-events="none"/>
<!-- Rotated label at mid-row -->
<g transform="translate(15,ROW_MID)">
  <text text-anchor="middle" font-family="Helvetica" font-size="12"
        transform="rotate(-90)" fill="rgb(0,0,0)">LAYER_NAME</text>
</g>
```

Where `ROW_MID = ROW_Y + 100`.

---

## 5. Shape types

All shapes use BPMN notation.

### 5.1 Task (rounded rectangle)

**mxGraphModel:**
```xml
<mxCell id="tN" value="Task Label"
  style="points=[[0.25,0,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0,0],[1,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[1,0.75,0],
                 [0.75,1,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.25,1,0],[0,0.75,0],[0,0.5,0],[0,0.25,0]];
         shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;
         container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=abstract;"
  parent="SWIMLANE_ID" vertex="1">
  <mxGeometry x="X" y="Y" width="120" height="80" as="geometry" />
</mxCell>
```

**SVG rendering** (rounded rect + centered text, wrapping if needed):
```xml
<rect x="ABS_X" y="ABS_Y" width="120" height="80" rx="10" ry="10"
      fill="rgb(255,255,255)" stroke="rgb(0,0,0)" stroke-miterlimit="10" pointer-events="all"/>
<text x="CENTER_X" y="TEXT_Y" text-anchor="middle"
      font-family="Helvetica" font-size="11" fill="rgb(0,0,0)">Task Label</text>
```
For multi-line text, emit one `<text>` per line at `y + 14px` increments.

### 5.2 Start event (thin-border circle)

**mxGraphModel:**
```xml
<mxCell id="start" value=""
  style="points=[[0.145,0.145,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.855,0.145,0],[1,0.5,0],[0.855,0.855,0],
                 [0.5,1,0],[0.145,0.855,0],[0,0.5,0]];
         shape=mxgraph.bpmn.event;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;
         labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;
         perimeter=ellipsePerimeter;outlineConnect=0;aspect=fixed;
         outline=standard;symbol=general;"
  parent="SWIMLANE_ID" vertex="1">
  <mxGeometry x="X" y="Y" width="50" height="50" as="geometry" />
</mxCell>
```

**SVG rendering** (white-filled circle, thin border):
```xml
<ellipse cx="CX" cy="CY" rx="25" ry="25"
         fill="rgb(255,255,255)" stroke="rgb(0,0,0)" stroke-width="1.5" pointer-events="all"/>
```

### 5.3 End event (thick-border, black-filled circle)

**mxGraphModel:**
```xml
<mxCell id="end" value=""
  style="...shape=mxgraph.bpmn.event;...outline=end;symbol=terminate;"
  parent="SWIMLANE_ID" vertex="1">
  <mxGeometry x="X" y="Y" width="50" height="50" as="geometry" />
</mxCell>
```

**SVG rendering** (black-filled circle, thick border):
```xml
<ellipse cx="CX" cy="CY" rx="23" ry="23"
         fill="rgb(0,0,0)" stroke="rgb(0,0,0)" stroke-width="3" pointer-events="all"/>
```

### 5.4 Gateway (exclusive, diamond with X)

**mxGraphModel:**
```xml
<mxCell id="gwN" value="Question?"
  style="points=[[0.25,0,0],...];
         shape=mxgraph.bpmn.gateway2;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;
         labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;
         perimeter=rhombusPerimeter;outlineConnect=0;outline=exclusive;symbol=exclusive;"
  parent="SWIMLANE_ID" vertex="1">
  <mxGeometry x="X" y="Y" width="50" height="50" as="geometry" />
</mxCell>
```

**SVG rendering** (white diamond + two crossed lines + label below):
```xml
<polygon points="CX,TOP CX+25,CY CX,BOTTOM CX-25,CY"
         fill="rgb(255,255,255)" stroke="rgb(0,0,0)" stroke-width="1.5" pointer-events="all"/>
<line x1="CX-14" y1="CY-14" x2="CX+14" y2="CY+14" stroke="rgb(0,0,0)" stroke-width="2"/>
<line x1="CX-14" y1="CY+14" x2="CX+14" y2="CY-14" stroke="rgb(0,0,0)" stroke-width="2"/>
<text x="CX" y="BOTTOM+13" text-anchor="middle"
      font-family="Helvetica" font-size="11" fill="rgb(0,0,0)">Question?</text>
```

---

## 6. Edges (sequence flows)

### mxGraphModel edge cell

```xml
<mxCell id="eN" value=""
  style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;"
  parent="1" edge="1" source="SOURCE_ID" target="TARGET_ID">
  <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"></mxGeometry>
</mxCell>
```

For edges that cross swimlane boundaries, `parent="1"` (the root layer). For edges confined
within a swimlane, `parent="SWIMLANE_ID"`.

**Optional waypoints** (for cross-lane routing):
```xml
<mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry">
  <Array as="points">
    <mxPoint x="X1" y="Y1" />
    <mxPoint x="X2" y="Y2" />
  </Array>
</mxGeometry>
```

### Edge labels

```xml
<mxCell id="eN_l" value="Label text"
  style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];"
  parent="eN" vertex="1">
  <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry">
    <mxPoint as="offset" />
  </mxGeometry>
</mxCell>
```

### SVG rendering of an edge

A straight right-pointing arrow:
```xml
<!-- Shaft -->
<path d="M SX SY L EX EY" fill="none" stroke="rgb(0,0,0)"
      stroke-miterlimit="10" pointer-events="stroke"/>
<!-- Arrowhead (filled triangle pointing right) -->
<path d="M EX EY L EX-6.5 EY+4.7 L EX-6.5 EY-4.7 Z" fill="rgb(0,0,0)"/>
<!-- Optional label background + text -->
<rect x="LX" y="LY" width="W" height="14" fill="rgb(255,255,255)" stroke="none"/>
<text x="LCX" y="LTY" text-anchor="middle"
      font-family="Helvetica" font-size="10" fill="rgb(0,0,0)">Label text</text>
```

For edges with bends, use a multi-segment path:
```xml
<path d="M X0 Y0 L X1 Y1 L X2 Y2 L X3 Y3"
      fill="none" stroke="rgb(0,0,0)" stroke-miterlimit="10" pointer-events="stroke"/>
```

---

## 7. Layout rules

- Canvas width: `1500px` (standard), `1110px` (narrower diagrams).
- Lane height: `200px` each. Canvas height = number_of_lanes × 200.
- Left margin (swimlane label tab): `30px`. Shapes start at absolute x ≥ `70px`.
- Start event at x ≈ `40–70` (relative to lane), y centred in lane (`y ≈ 75`).
- End event at the far right of the lane, y centred (`y ≈ 75`).
- Tasks: `width=120–175`, `height=80`. Space tasks `~60px` apart horizontally.
- Gateways: `50×50`. Centred vertically in lane.

---

## 8. Step-by-step checklist for every new diagram

1. **Plan** the swimlane rows: list each actor/API layer top-to-bottom.
2. **Compute** canvas dimensions: `height = lanes × 200`, `width = 1500` (or `1100` for narrow).
3. **Write** the mxGraphModel XML:
   - Add `mxCell` nodes for each swimlane (`style="swimlane;horizontal=0;..."`).
   - Add BPMN shape cells (start event → tasks → gateways → end event) inside each swimlane.
   - Add edge cells (`edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle`) connecting the shapes. Include edge-label child cells where the flow name should be shown.
4. **XML-escape** the entire mxGraphModel XML and embed it as the `content` attribute value.
5. **Write** the SVG rendering elements (paths, rects, ellipses, polygons, text) that mirror each mxGraphModel shape.
6. **Validate**: run the Python XML check (section 3) – must print `Valid XML`.
7. **Save** to `architecture/diagrams/use-cases/<name>-use-case.drawio.svg`.

---

## 9. Reference: color values for SVG rendering

| CSS color | `rgb()` form |
|---|---|
| `#f5f5f5` | `rgb(245,245,245)` |
| `#666666` | `rgb(102,102,102)` |
| `#dae8fc` | `rgb(218,232,252)` |
| `#6c8ebf` | `rgb(108,142,191)` |
| `#d5e8d4` | `rgb(213,232,212)` |
| `#82b366` | `rgb(130,179,102)` |
| `#fff8e1` | `rgb(255,248,225)` |
| `#d6b656` | `rgb(214,182,86)` |
| `#f0e8f4` | `rgb(240,232,244)` |
| `#9673a6` | `rgb(150,115,166)` |

---

## 10. Quick-reference: BPMN style strings

```
# Task
shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=abstract;

# Start event
shape=mxgraph.bpmn.event;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;perimeter=ellipsePerimeter;outlineConnect=0;aspect=fixed;outline=standard;symbol=general;

# End event  
shape=mxgraph.bpmn.event;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;perimeter=ellipsePerimeter;outlineConnect=0;aspect=fixed;outline=end;symbol=terminate;

# Exclusive gateway
shape=mxgraph.bpmn.gateway2;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;perimeter=rhombusPerimeter;outlineConnect=0;outline=exclusive;symbol=exclusive;

# Edge
edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;

# Edge label
edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];

# Swimlane row
swimlane;horizontal=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=COLOR;strokeColor=COLOR;
```
